articles.title: Review & setlist: Bob Dylan was spookily stellar on a smoky night in Boston
articles.description:
While casual fans might have been confused, Dylan's Leader Bank Pavilion concert was perfect for the people who love him, warts and all.

The post Review & setlist: Bob Dylan was spookily stellar on a smoky night in Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Bob Dylan performed at Leader Bank Pavilion on July 16, 2026, captivating dedicated fans.
The concert featured a unique setlist that resonated with long-time followers of Dylan.
Local businesses benefited from increased foot traffic and sales during the concert event.

articles.title: The middle seat will become a table on United’s newest Airbus jets
articles.description:
The seats will go on sale later this year.

The post The middle seat will become a table on United’s newest Airbus jets appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: United Airlines will introduce table middle seats on new Airbus jets later this year.
Boston residents can expect these innovative seats to enhance in-flight dining experiences.
The new seating arrangement aims to improve comfort for travelers flying from Boston.

articles.title: Boston College football knows it has a lot to prove after 2-10 campaign, and other ACC Kickoff takeaways
articles.description:
As Boston College football transfers Mason McKenzie and Anthony Palano arrived at ACC Kickoff in Charlotte, N.C., early Thursday morning, both took a moment to reflect on how far they have come. McKenzie, a dual-threat quarterback who played three years at Division 2 Saginaw Valley State, found himself sitting next to Jimbo Fisher and shaking […]

The post Boston College football knows it has a lot to prove after 2-10 campaign, and other ACC Kickoff takeaways appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Boston College football aims to improve after a disappointing 2-10 season last year.
Transfers Mason McKenzie and Anthony Palano attended ACC Kickoff in Charlotte on July 17.
Local fans hope new talent will revitalize the team's performance in the upcoming season.

articles.title: Original ‘Gilmore Girls’ house is on the market for $2.76 million
articles.description:
While the show is set in Connecticut and was mostly filmed on a lot in California, this house is actually over the border.

The post Original ‘Gilmore Girls’ house is on the market for $2.76 million appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Original 'Gilmore Girls' house listed for $2.76 million in Ontario, Canada.
House is located just over the border, attracting Boston fans and real estate interest.
Potential for increased tourism and interest in TV-related properties in the Boston area.

articles.title: Longtime Maine soccer coach recognized by FIFA as ‘Unsung Hero’
articles.description:
"It's the epitome of everything that I love. I love sport, I love people, and I love making a difference.”

The post Longtime Maine soccer coach recognized by FIFA as ‘Unsung Hero’ appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Maine soccer coach Gary Newell recognized by FIFA as an 'Unsung Hero'.
Newell's contributions highlight the importance of community sports in New England.
Recognition may inspire Boston youth to engage in soccer and community service.

articles.title: Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns match the major championship record with 62s at the British Open
articles.description:
Herbert missed a 5-foot par putt on the tough 18th hole at Royal Birkdale that would have given the Australian the record alone.

The post Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns match the major championship record with 62s at the British Open appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lucas Herbert and Sam Burns both scored 62 at the British Open, tying a major championship record.
Herbert narrowly missed a 5-foot par putt on the 18th hole at Royal Birkdale.
Boston golf fans celebrate local ties as Burns, a prominent player, continues to excel in major tournaments.
